title: From Microorganisms to Biosignatures:  Subcritical Water Extraction as a Sample Preparation Technique for Future Life Detection Missions
author: Cieslarova, Zuzana
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Data for all figures included in "From Microorganisms to Biosignatures:  Subcritical Water Extraction as a Sample Preparation Technique for Future Life Detection Missions". Amino acid concentrations, enantiomeric excesses, and relative distributions for E. coli cells and B. subtilis spores after subcritical water extraction for 30 min at 200 °C using water and dilute acid.
steps_raw: Data for all figures included in "From Microorganisms to Biosignatures:  Subcritical Water Extraction as a Sample Preparation Technique for Future Life Detection Missions". Amino acid concentrations, enantiomeric excesses, and relative distributions for E. coli cells and B. subtilis spores after subcritical water extraction for 30 min at 200 °C using water and dilute acid.
